## Checklist

- [ ] Tests added or updated
- [ ] `pytest tests/ -q` passes
- [ ] `ruff check porthawk/` passes
- [ ] `black --check porthawk/` passes
- [ ] README updated if this adds/changes user-facing behavior
- [ ] CHANGELOG entry added under `[Unreleased]` (or new version section)
